eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; at 09:25 PM ON MAY 5, 2026 Effective until 05:25 AM MAY 6, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
A SAFE Alert has been issued for Mesa PD. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. Mesa PD is looking for Hispanic male Heriberto Solano, last seen on foot near Country Club and Brown Rd in Mesa AZ. Heriberto is 77 years old, 5 feet 10 inches, 160 lbs. with gray hair and brown eyes. It is unknown what he was last wearing but typically wears a t-shirt and jeans.

If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
